texto: What's funny is my mom took me to the theater for the first time when I was six years old, and I was just amazed by it. I just said, 'Hey Mom, can I do this too?' And so she signed me up for little theater classes, and I remember my first audition for a play when I was seven years old was for 'The Thankful Elf.'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dana Davis que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “What's funny is my mom took me to the theater for the first time when I was six years old, and I …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre gratidao, funny, time, com foco em time e mom.
